title: Vendors

createVendor.title: Create vendor company
createVendor.comingSoon: This page is under development. Vendor creation will be available soon.

addFirstVendor: Invite your first vendor to get started
failedToLoad: Failed to load vendors. Please refresh.

cancelInvitationModal.title: Cancel Invitation
cancelInvitationModal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.
cancelInvitationModal.info: You are about to cancel the invitation for {{name}} ({{email}}). This will permanently remove their account from the platform.

resetInvitationModal.title: Reset Invitation
resetInvitationModal.subtitle: A new invitation will be sent to this vendor.
resetInvitationModal.info: A new invitation link will be sent to {{email}}. The previous invitation link will be invalidated.

archiveVendorModal.title: Archive Vendor
archiveVendorModal.subtitle: This vendor will lose access to the system immediately.
archiveVendorModal.info: You are going to archive the vendor {{name}} ({{email}}). After archiving, the vendor will no longer be able to log in and will receive a notification by email.

deactivateVendorModal.title: Deactivate Vendor
deactivateVendorModal.subtitle: This vendor will lose access to the system immediately.
deactivateVendorModal.info: You are going to deactivate the vendor {{name}} ({{email}}). After deactivation, the vendor will no longer be able to log in and will receive a notification by email.

archiveVendorsModal.title: Archive All Vendors
archiveVendorsModal.subtitle: All active vendors of this company will lose access to the system immediately.
archiveVendorsModal.info: You are going to archive all active vendors of {{companyName}}. After archiving, they will no longer be able to log in and will receive a notification by email.

archiveVendorSuccess.title: Vendor Archived
archiveVendorSuccess.description: The vendor {{email}} has been successfully archived. They will no longer have access to the system.
archiveVendorSuccess.note: An email notification has been sent to the vendor.

archiveVendorsSuccess.title: Vendors Archived
archiveVendorsSuccess.description: All active vendors of {{companyName}} have been successfully archived. They will no longer have access to the system.
archiveVendorsSuccess.note: Email notifications have been sent to all archived vendors.

deactivateVendorSuccess.title: Vendor Deactivated
deactivateVendorSuccess.description: The vendor {{email}} has been successfully deactivated. They will no longer have access to the system.
deactivateVendorSuccess.note: An email notification has been sent to the vendor.

inviteModal.title: Add a new vendor account
inviteModal.subtitle: Invite a vendor representative to join the platform
inviteModal.emailInUse: A user with this email already exists
inviteModal.alreadyAssigned: This vendor is already in your vendor list
inviteModal.inviteError: Failed to send vendor invitation. Please try again.

inviteSuccess.title: Invitation has been sent successfully
inviteSuccess.subtitle: An invitation has been sent to the provided email address.
inviteSuccess.info: The user {{email}} will receive an activation email with a secure link to set their password. Once the password is set, they will become a member of the company and gain access to the system.
inviteSuccess.expiry: The activation link will expire in 30 days. The user and their data will remain in the system, allowing you to resend the link if needed
inviteSuccess.alreadyExisted: This vendor already exists on the platform and has been added to your vendor list.
